title: AstraZeneca India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: AstraZeneca India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
AstraZeneca India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About AstraZeneca India:
AstraZeneca India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AstraZeneca India!
